2605.10886.title: LoKA: Low-precision Kernel Applications for Recommendation Models At Scale
2605.10886.paper_summary: Recent GPU generations deliver significantly higher FLOPs using lower-precision arithmetic, such as FP8. While successfully applied to large language models (LLMs), its adoption in large recommendation models (LRMs) has been limited. This is because LRMs are numerically sensitive, dominated by small matrix multiplications (GEMMs) followed by normalization, and trained in communication-intensive environments. Applying FP8 directly to LRMs often degrades model quality and prolongs training time. These challenges are inherent to LRM workloads and cannot be resolved merely by introducing better FP8 kernels. Instead, a system-model co-design approach is needed to successfully integrate FP8. We present LoKA (Low-precision Kernel Applications), a framework that makes FP8 practical for LRMs through three principles: profile under realistic distributions to know where low precision is safe, co-design model components with hardware to expand where it is safe, and orchestrate across kernel libraries to maximize the gains. Concretely, LoKA Probe is a statistically grounded, online benchmarking method that learns activation and weight statistics, and quantifies per-layer errors. This process pinpoints safe and unsafe, fast and slow sites for FP8 adoption. LoKA Mods is a set of reusable model adaptations that improve both numerical stability and execution efficiency with FP8. LoKA Dispatch is a runtime that leverages the statistical insights from LoKA Probe to select the fastest FP8 kernel that satisfies the accuracy requirements.
2605.10886.paper_summary_zh: 最近的GPU世代使用較低精度的算術運算（如FP8）提供了顯著更高的FLOPs。雖然成功應用於大型語言模型（LLMs），但在大型推薦模型（LRMs）中的採用卻有限。這是因為LRMs在數值上非常敏感，主要受小型矩陣乘法（GEMMs）和隨後的正規化所主導，並且在通信密集的環境中進行訓練。直接將FP8應用於LRMs往往會降低模型質量並延長訓練時間。這些挑戰是LRM工作負載固有的，僅僅引入更好的FP8內核無法解決。相反，需要一種系統模型共同設計的方法來成功整合FP8。我們提出了LoKA（低精度內核應用），這是一個通過三個原則使FP8適用於LRMs的框架：在現實分佈下進行剖析，以了解低精度的安全性，與硬體共同設計模型組件以擴展安全範圍，並在內核庫之間進行協調以最大化收益。具體而言，LoKA Probe是一種統計基礎的在線基準測試方法，學習激活和權重統計，並量化每層的誤差。這個過程確定了FP8採用的安全和不安全、快速和緩慢的區域。LoKA Mods是一組可重用的模型適應，利用FP8改善數值穩定性和執行效率。LoKA Dispatch是一個運行時，利用LoKA Probe的統計見解來選擇滿足準確性要求的最快FP8內核。
2605.10886.author: Liang Luo et.al.
2605.10886.authors: Liang Luo, Yinbin Ma, Quanyu Zhu, Vasiliy Kuznetsov, Yuxin Chen, Jian Jiao, Jiecao Yu, Buyun Zhang, Tongyi Tang, Xiaohan Wei, Yanli Zhao, Zeliang Chen, Yuchen Hao, Venkatesh Ranganathan, Sandeep Parab, Yantao Yao, Maxim Naumov, Chunzhi Yang, Shen Li, Ellie Wen, Wenlin Chen, Santanu Kolay, Chunqiang Tang
